u: Hai. Mental health issue. Ek. Ye. Boredom ya monotony ek emotional state hota hai jahan kisi vyakti ko apne zindagi ya activities mein koi interest ya excitement nahi mahsus hota. Ye ek tarah ka mental fatigue hota hai jahan vyakti ko har cheez repetitive aur uninteresting lagti hai.  Boredom ya monotony ke kuchh common symptoms hain:  1. Koi activity ya kaam karne ka man nahi karna 2. Har cheez repetitive aur uninteresting lagti hai 3. Koi excitement ya interest nahi mahsus hota 4. Mental fatigue ya thakawat mahsus hoti hai 5. Koi creative ya productive work karne ka man nahi karna  Boredom ya monotony ke kuchh karan hain:  1. Routine ya daily schedule mein koi change nahi hona 2. Koi new ya challenging activity ya kaam nahi milna 3. Personal problems ya stress 4. Lack of social interaction ya communication 5. Koi hobby ya interest nahi hona  Agar aapko boredom ya monotony mahsus ho raha hai, toh aap kuchh new activities ya hobbies try kar sakte hain, apne routine mein change kar sakte hain, ya apne friends ya family ke saath time spend kar sakte hain.. Time ho to padh lena 👆🏻
